translation.welcome_msg: Welcome to MatdataApp. Let's get started.
translation.eligibility_subtitle: Find out if you are eligible to register as a voter in India.
translation.eligibility_q1: Are you 18 years or older (or will you turn 18 by the qualifying date)?
translation.eligibility_q2: Are you a citizen of India?
translation.eligibility_q3: Are you ordinarily a resident of the constituency you want to register in?
translation.eligibility_q4: Have you been disqualified from voting by any court or authority?
translation.eligible_msg: Based on your answers, you appear to be eligible to register as a voter in India! Please note that this is general guidance and not a legal determination.
translation.register_form6: To apply for new voter registration, you can fill out Form 6 online at the official Election Commission of India portal:
translation.reason_age: You must be 18 years or older (or turning 18 by the qualifying date) to register.
translation.reason_citizen: Only citizens of India are eligible to register and vote in Indian elections.
translation.reason_resident: You must be an ordinary resident of the constituency where you wish to register.
translation.reason_disqualified: Persons disqualified by a court of law or authorized electoral authority are not eligible to register.
